name: PMAY-U 2.0
target_description: Urban families in EWS (≤₹3L), LIG (₹3-6L), MIG (₹6-9L) without a pucca house
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
data_source: PMAY-U 2.0 Scheme Guidelines, September 2024, Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

rules.description: Applicant must reside in an urban area (statutory town / notified planning area)
Annual household income must fall within EWS/LIG/MIG brackets. EWS ≤3L, LIG 3-6L, MIG 6-9L annual household income
rules.ambiguity_note: Income refers to annual household income — ambiguity whether individual vs. combined household income is used

rules.description: Must not own a pucca house anywhere in India
rules.ambiguity_note: Owning land does not automatically mean owning a pucca house — 'owns' is ambiguous as applicant may own land but not a habitable dwelling

rules.description: Applicant must have Aadhaar for identity and deduplication
Must not have been allotted house under any govt housing scheme in last 20 years

benefit_summary: Central assistance for house construction/purchase via BLC/AHP/ARH/ISS verticals. House carpet area 30-90 sqm, value up to ₹45 lakh.

application_offices.find_instruction: Your city's municipal corporation or nagar palika office
Find the nearest CSC at locator.csccloud.in

description: Urban housing assistance for EWS/LIG/MIG families through four verticals: in-situ slum redevelopment, affordable housing through credit-linked subsidy (home loan interest subsidy of 3–6.5%), partnership with private developers, and direct beneficiary-led construction. Covers first-time home buyers only.
description_hindi: शहरी गरीब और मध्यम वर्ग के परिवारों के लिए पक्का घर बनाने या खरीदने पर सरकारी सहायता। होम लोन पर 3–6.5% तक ब्याज सब्सिडी मिलती है (क्रेडिट लिंक्ड सब्सिडी)। झुग्गी-बस्तियों का पुनर्निर्माण और किफायती मकानों का निर्माण भी इसमें शामिल है। पहली बार घर खरीदने वालों के लिए ही लागू।
benefit_summary_hindi: होम लोन पर 3–6.5% ब्याज सब्सिडी या सीधी निर्माण सहायता
